name_romaji: Koizumi Jōshi (Tomioka Jōshi) Tsuketari Jōnouchi Kofun (Fukugen)
name_en: Koizumi Castle Ruins (Tomioka Castle Ruins), with the Reconstructed Jōnouchi Kofun
description_en: A monument (historic site), the ruins of Koizumi Castle (also known as Tomioka Castle), together with the reconstructed Jōnouchi burial mound. It is a town-designated historic site of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1979-11-30.

name_en: Reputed Grave of Kojima Takanori
description_en: A monument (historic site), the reputed grave of Kojima Takanori. It is a town-designated historic site of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1979-11-30.

name_en: Kōshin Monument of Aoso Shrine (Dated Kanbun 9)
description_en: A folk cultural property, the Kōshin stone monument of Aoso Shrine bearing a Kanbun 9 (1669) inscription. It is a town-designated important tangible folk cultural property of Ōizumi Town, designated on 1983-12-01.

name_en: Bunsei 4 Surveyed Map of Amagawara Village
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a detailed surveyed map of Amagawara Village dating from Bunsei 4 (1821). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1964-12-22, located at the Prefectural Archives, Bunkyō-chō 3-chōme 27-26.

name_en: Bunsei 4 Map of Maebashi Town
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a map of Maebashi Town dating from Bunsei 4 (1821). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1964-12-22, located at the Prefectural Archives, Bunkyō-chō 3-chōme 27-26.

name_en: Main Gate of Daitokuji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the sōmon main gate of Daitokuji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1964-12-22, located at Daitokuji Temple, Koaigi-machi 91.

name_en: Treasure Pagoda of the Former Kakudōji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the treasure pagoda (hōtō) of the former Kakudōji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1964-12-22, located at Jōmyōin, Kōden-machi 544-1.

name_en: Stone Coffin of the Karōtoyama Kofun
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the stone coffin from the Karōtoyama burial mound. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1964-12-22, located at Nakagawa Elementary School, Mikawa-machi 2-chōme 1-3.

name_en: Calligraphy: Waka Poem Card by Toyotomi Hideyoshi
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a calligraphic waka poem card (tanzaku) attributed to Toyotomi Hideyoshi. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1964-12-22, located at Myōanji Temple, Chiyoda-machi 3-chōme 3-30.

name_en: Canopied Yakushi Stupa
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a canopied Yakushi stone stupa (tōba). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1970-02-10, located at Inari Shrine, Tonya-machi 2-chōme 3-4.

name_en: Portrait of Yūki Masakatsu
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a portrait of Yūki Masakatsu. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1973-09-24, located at Kōkenji Temple, Asahi-machi 4-chōme 29-24.

name_en: Portrait of Sakai Shigetada
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a portrait of Sakai Shigetada. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1973-09-24, located at Genʼeiji Temple, Ōte-machi 3-chōme 17-22.

name_en: Waniguchi Gong of Tōfukuji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the waniguchi gong of Tōfukuji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1973-09-24, located at Tōfukuji Temple, Mikawa-machi 1-chōme 9-18.

name_en: Memorial Monument of Ojimada
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a memorial (kuyō) monument at Ojimada. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1973-09-24, located at Daimon-ato 530, Ojimada-machi.

name_en: Tahōtō Pagoda of Daitokuji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the tahōtō pagoda of Daitokuji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1973-09-24, located at Daitokuji Temple, Koaigi-machi 91.

name_en: Amida Triad Painted Stone Stele
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a stone stele (itabi) painted with the Amida triad. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1973-09-24, located at Jōmyōin, Kōden-machi 544-1.

name_en: Layered Pagoda of Tōgakuji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the layered stone pagoda (sōtō) of Tōgakuji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1973-09-24, located at Kōgonji Temple, Sōja-machi Sōja 1607.

name_en: Kanʼei-Era Votive Tablet of Nichirinji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a Kanʼei-era votive tablet (ema) of Nichirinji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1974-08-26, located at Nichirinji Temple, Nichirinji-machi 412.

name_en: Eight-Lobed Mirror of Santai Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the eight-lobed bronze mirror of Santai Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1974-08-26, located at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History, Watanuki-machi 992-1, Takasaki City.

name_en: Seated Thousand-Armed Kannon of Jishōin Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a seated statue of the Thousand-Armed Kannon of Jishōin Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1975-12-24, located at Jishōin, Ninomiya-machi 1811.

name_en: Bo Ya Playing the Zither Mirror
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a bronze mirror depicting Bo Ya (Hakuga) playing the zither. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1975-12-24, located at Hachimangū Shrine, Honmachi 2-chōme 7-2.

name_en: Yakuimon Gate of Kōgonji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the yakuimon gate of Kōgonji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1975-12-24, located at Kōgonji Temple, Sōja-machi Sōja 1607.

name_en: Standing Statue of the Bodhisattva Jizō of Muryōjuji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a standing statue of the bodhisattva Jizō of Muryōjuji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1975-12-24, located at Muryōjuji Temple, Ninomiya-machi kō 764.

name_en: Standing Eleven-Headed Kannon of Muryōjuji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a standing statue of the eleven-headed Kannon of Muryōjuji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1975-12-24, located at Muryōjuji Temple, Ninomiya-machi kō 764.

name_en: Temple Bell of Ninomiya Akagi Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the bonshō temple bell of Ninomiya Akagi Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1975-12-24, located at Ninomiya Akagi Shrine, Ninomiya-machi 886.

name_en: Votive Tablet of Ninomiya Akagi Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a votive tablet (ema) of Ninomiya Akagi Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1975-12-24, located at Ninomiya Akagi Shrine, Ninomiya-machi 886.

name_romaji: Maebashi-han Keijō Ato Kuyōtō Narabini Michishirube
name_en: Memorial Monument and Guidepost at the Maebashi Domain Execution Ground Site
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising the memorial monument (kuyōtō) and guidepost at the site of the Maebashi Domain execution ground. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1975-12-24, located at Tenkawa-Ōshima-machi 290-5.

name_en: Unusual-Form Stone Stele of Hōzenji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an unusual-form stone stele (itabi) of Hōzenji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1975-12-24, located at Hōzenji Temple, Kamiizumi-machi 1277-1.

name_en: Treasure Pagoda of Sannō
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a treasure pagoda (hōtō) at Sannō. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1975-12-24, located at Sannō-machi 99-5.

name_en: Hachimangū Documents: One Scroll of Nine Letters
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a scroll of nine documents of Hachimangū Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1975-12-24, located at Hachimangū Shrine, Honmachi 2-chōme 7-2.

name_romaji: Maebashi Gion Matsuri Fuda Emaki Nikan
name_en: Maebashi Gion Festival Talisman Picture Scrolls, Two Scrolls
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising two picture scrolls (emaki) depicting the talismans of the Maebashi Gion festival. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1975-12-24, located at the Municipal Library, Ōte-machi 2-chōme 12-9.

name_en: Sakai Family Historical Materials, 129 Items
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising 129 items of historical materials of the Sakai family. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1983-04-25, located at the Municipal Library, Ōte-machi 2-chōme 12-9.

name_en: Treasure Pagoda of Ninomiya Akagi Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a treasure pagoda (hōtō) of Ninomiya Akagi Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1983-04-25, located at Ninomiya Akagi Shrine, Ninomiya-machi 886.

name_en: Haniwa Figure of a Dancing Man
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a haniwa clay figure of a dancing man. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1983-04-25, located at Haga Elementary School, Katsuzawa-machi 719.

name_en: Memorial Monument of the Former Zōji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the memorial monument (kuyōtō) of the former Zōji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1984-03-12, located at Saizenji Temple, Higashi-Ōmuro-machi kō 6.

name_en: Records of Ittanizan, Eight Volumes
description_en: A tangible cultural property comprising eight volumes of the records of Ittanizan. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1985-03-27, located at Myōanji Temple, Chiyoda-machi 3-chōme 3-30.

name_en: Myōanji Manuscript Record (in the Hand of Saichōin Jōken), One Volume
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a one-volume manuscript record of Myōanji Temple in the hand of Saichōin Jōken. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1985-03-27, located at Myōanji Temple, Chiyoda-machi 3-chōme 3-30.

name_en: Old Genealogy Scroll of Myōanji Temple, One Scroll
description_en: A tangible cultural property, an old genealogy scroll of Myōanji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1985-03-27, located at Myōanji Temple, Chiyoda-machi 3-chōme 3-30.

name_romaji: Ittanizan Saichōin Myōanji Engi Jō, Ge Nikan
name_en: History of Ittanizan Saichōin Myōanji Temple, Two Volumes
description_en: A tangible cultural property, the two-volume origin history (engi) of Ittanizan Saichōin Myōanji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1985-03-27, located at Myōanji Temple, Chiyoda-machi 3-chōme 3-30.

name_en: Yuishinshō (Attributed to Shinran), One Volume
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a one-volume copy of the Yuishinshō attributed to the hand of Shinran. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Maebashi City, designated on 1985-03-27, located at Myōanji Temple, Chiyoda-machi 3-chōme 3-30.
